title: bomarea ovallei
intro: Bomarea ovallei, also known as the Oval-leaved Bomarea or Oval-leaved Gloriosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae, native to the tropical Andes of South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bomarea ovallei include its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
